real_client_001.text: {"action_items": [{"owner": "Engineer", "task": "Deploy a link to the App demo for Client to explore on his own", "due": "tonight"}, {"owner": "Client", "task": "Send the 57-page story treatments document to Engineer and Partner", "due": "tomorrow morning"}]}

{"action_items":[{"owner":"Engineer","task":"Deploy a link to the App demo and send it to Client and Partner","due":"tonight"},{"owner":"Client","task":"Send the 57-page story treatments document to Engineer and Partner","due":"tomorrow morning"},{"owner":"Client","task":"Think about which path to direct the University MIS students (intake platform vs. content organization) and decide before Tuesday meeting","due":"before next Tuesday"},{"owner":"Engineer","task":"Add more content points and finish the timeline feature, then reconvene for a short follow-up meeting","due":"after receiving the document from Client"}]}

{"action_items": [{"owner": "Engineer", "task": "Deploy a link to the App demo for Client and Partner to explore on their own", "due": "tonight (Friday night)"},{"owner": "Client", "task": "Send the 57-page story treatments document to Engineer and Partner", "due": "tomorrow morning (Saturday)"}]}

{"action_items":[{"owner":"Engineer","task":"Deploy a link to the App demo and send it to Client and Partner","due":"tonight"},{"owner":"Client","task":"Send the 57-page story treatments document to Engineer and Partner","due":"tomorrow morning"},{"owner":"Client","task":"Think about which path to direct the University MIS students (intake platform vs. content organization) and decide before meeting with them","due":"next Tuesday"},{"owner":"Engineer","task":"Add more content points to the map, finish the timeline feature, and prepare a more functional version of the App for a follow-up meeting","due":"before next reconvene meeting"}]}

{"action_items":[{"owner":"Engineer","task":"Deploy a link to the App demo and send it to Client and Partner","due":"tonight"},{"owner":"Client","task":"Send the 57-page document of 22 stories to Engineer and Partner","due":"tomorrow morning"},{"owner":"Client","task":"Figure out direction/scope for the University MIS students project","due":"by next Tuesday"}]}

{"action_items":[{"owner":"Engineer","task":"Deploy a link to the App demo and send it to Client and Partner","due":"tonight"},{"owner":"Client","task":"Send the 57-page document of 22 stories to Engineer and Partner","due":"tomorrow morning"},{"owner":"Client","task":"Think about which path to direct the University MIS students (intake platform vs. content organization) and provide direction","due":"next Tuesday"}]}

{"action_items":[{"owner":"Engineer","task":"Deploy a link to the App demo and send it to Client","due":"tonight"},{"owner":"Client","task":"Send the 57-page document of 22 stories to Engineer and Partner","due":"tomorrow morning"},{"owner":"Client","task":"Send Engineer additional Band A context info (e.g., Band C playing same night, photography, poster)","due":"after this meeting"}]}
